post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 181 (Newbie Game 74): Destiny 2 Mafia

If you are not currently alive in this game, please do not post in this thread. Visit this thread to sign up for future games.

Credits to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123 (among others) for the rule template.

Flavor
Three weeks ago, the City was raided by a large Fallen strike force. The Vanguard deployed, and were easily able to defeat the invasion, but a few Fallen survived. Using repurposed Marauder cloaks, they were able to hide amongst the civilians. Now, they have begun to assume human, Awoken, and even Exo appearances, using some unknown technology, and have infiltrated the population. As a result, the civilians have banded together, and have begun to democratically select people to be killed every day, in the hope of rooting out the Fallen infiltrators.


Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification. Questions asked in-thread will only be answered in-PM, if at all, unless I specifically believe it is something worth telling the general public.
  • Do not share any information (screenshots, copy-paste, etc.) from your role PM in the thread under any circumstances.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderators, unless you are specifically allowed to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Hanging
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. Ties will be explained in the next section. Starting Day 2, majority hanging is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • If there is a tie vote at the end of the day between two players, the result of it will be randomized. However, if there are an equal number of votes for No Hang and a player, No Hang will be the result.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this - see below.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work. Most other fakevotes are acceptable, but please PM me to confirm that it is. If we do not notice that you fakevoted, it may be counted as a real vote, so it is a good idea to PM me every time you intend to fakevote.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang". (Note: This is not the same thing as unvoting.)
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting to not hang, then nobody will be hanged. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight (the time between the end of deadline and the moderator's "do not post" post), players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post an end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.


Activity
  • Each day will be 264 hours (11 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 264 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • Activity rule for this game: While not on V/LA, you are expected to make at least one game-advancing post between every activity check, which will be done roughly every 48 hours. If you miss one activity check, you will get an in-game prod; if you miss two activity checks in a row, you will get a PM prod; if you miss three activity checks in a row, you will be replaced. Do not try to abuse this by saying "activity post" every two days - I will warn or replace you if I feel you are posting purely to bypass this requirement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to three warnings, and SE’s/IC's up to one. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force-replaced, depending on the scenario. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (benjaminsz) am the Moderator of Game 181. zdtsd is my co-moderator.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not do things that have the effect of impersonating a moderator. For the most part, though, posting in colors is fine.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.


Setup
This game will use the Backup6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.
  • There are 9 players.
  • This setup is Day Start.
  • Town Cop is guaranteed to be sane.
  • Town Doctor CANNOT target themselves.
  • Mafia Roleblocker CAN kill and block in the same night.
  • Mafia Roleblocker’s roleblock has priority over Town Jailkeeper’s roleblock.
  • Mafia members may only discuss with each other privately at night in the designated quicktopic.
  • If you have read all of the rules and are ready to participate in the game, please make a post with the word “Light” (spelled with a capital L) in it.
The roles for this game will be randomly selected out of the following possible role combinations before the game starts:

1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Universal Backup, 2 Mafia Goons

The setup that is chosen is not revealed.

Role PMs
Suriya Hawthorne (Town Doctor) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Suriya Hawthorne (Town Doctor). An experienced survivor, you were the leader of the Farm, the only surviving major human settlement, during the Red War, and you learned a thing or two about curing wounds without the aid of a Ghost in the process. Now, among other things, you are the Last City’s resident medical expert. Once a night, you may PM me a person's username (not yourself). That person will then be protected from being killed by the Mafia that night. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Cayde-6 (Town Tracker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Cayde-6 (Town Tracker). As the Hunter Vanguard Colonel, you’re the finest fast moving, swashbuckling, death-dealing Exo out there, and you have centuries of Guardian experience tracking down your targets. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. Using your ability, you will see who that person targeted each night, if any. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Commander Zavala (Town Jailkeeper) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Commander Zavala (Town Jailkeeper), leader of the Vanguard and the Titan Vanguard Colonel. You’ve lived longer that most Awoken or humans, and even most Exos, and those decades of experience being a Guardian have taught you the true meaning of determination. You also have the supreme responsibility of being the Last City’s chief and only arbiter of justice. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. You will roleblock them, preventing them from using their night action if any, but you will also protect them from being killed by the Mafia. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Ikora Rey (Town Cop) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Ikora Rey (Town Cop). You are the Warlock Vanguard Colonel, and also the smartest Guardian in the Last City. Having studied at the feet of the great Osiris himself, predecessor of Commander Zavala and the greatest Warlock ever to live, you have learned much about the use of Light in the examination of future realities and possibilities, and thus are able to find information about future events that most could never discern. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. You will then know if they are town or antitown (or if you failed to receive results). The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Lord Shaxx (Universal Backup) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Lord Shaxx (Town Universal Backup), the leader and handler of the Crucible, the arena in which Guardians do battle for valor and glory. Although you usually don’t show anyone your true capabilities, and indeed few people know much of anything about you, this business of the Fallen infiltrators has got you worried. If one of the Vanguard Colonels should be killed, it would be a disaster, and you might even have to step in personally to straighten things out. You will inherit the ability of the first Town Power Role who dies. Your power is reflexive and cannot be roleblocked. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Citizen of the Last City (Vanilla Townie) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Citizen of the Last City. (Vanilla Townie). You survived the Red war on the Farm, and that was tough enough with no Guardians to protect you, but at least back then you knew who and what you were fighting. This Fallen terrorism has you worried that you could be the next to die, and you’re determined to root the two Fallen out, even if it means risking the deaths of innocent civilians - just so long as those civilians aren’t you. Your strength comes in your voice and your vote. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon). You are one of the few survivors of the recent Fallen invasion, and determined to finish what you started. You and your partner, [username], [role name], can choose to kill a town player every night. During the night, you may discuss in [this QT]. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it.
Fallen Marauder Captain (Mafia Roleblocker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Fallen Marauder Captain (Mafia Roleblocker). You are the only surviving Captain from the recent Fallen invasion, and determined to finish what you started. With your partner, [username], Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon), you can choose to kill a town member every night. In addition, you may target one player every night. If that player performs a night action, it will be blocked. During the night, you may discuss in [this QT]. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it.


Alive (5)
  1. summitwei++
  2. Made_in_2004
  3. duansaops
  4. NaNoViRuS
  5. Argonauts16


Dead (4)
  1. Irshad (Vanilla Townie)
  2. MY-2 (Vanilla Townie)
  3. DivideAndConquer (Town Tracker)
  4. HannahW (Town Universal Backup)


Significant Events


Warnings
  • DivideAndConquer: 2 (editing post #422, OOTing)
  • Irshad: 1 (mass personal attack)
  • Argonauts16: 2 (posting at night, editing post 657)


Do not post until this line is crossed out unless your username is benjaminsz or zdtsd. Go crazy!

And, keep in mind: only TWO mafias in this game! And 9 players. Do the math: is about % chance of a person being mafia.
So I would prefer you try to stay away from using probability, because that can lead to some detrimental conclusions. Like, you might conclude that because odds are low that we end up hitting scum, we should just No Hang. This isn't correct logic (basically, hanging is better than letting the kills be chosen by scum), but it's the kind of stuff that you could easily conclude when you try to use probability.

I do think it is important to establish that there are more town than Mafia, so that's good, but any more than that is probably too much.

post_rendered: Normally the policy is for newbies who forget about the queue because it has taken so long to simply not respond to the PM asking them to join the game, at which point they will no longer receive PM's. The problem is that sometimes you have newbies who say they want to be in a game, even if they don't. It remains to be seen whether that is the case in this game. There have been instances of players responding to invite PM's, and then expecting to have to wait forever for the game to start because they waited so long for the invites, and thus not being active enough to notice the game has started.

post_rendered:
benjaminsz wrote:
Welcome to Mafia Game 181 (Newbie Game 74): Destiny 2 Mafia

If you are not currently alive in this game, please do not post in this thread. Visit this thread to sign up for future games.

Credits to Binomial-theorem/chaotic_iak/willwang123 (among others) for the rule template.

Flavor
Three weeks ago, the City was raided by a large Fallen strike force. The Vanguard deployed, and were easily able to defeat the invasion, but a few Fallen survived. Using repurposed Marauder cloaks, they were able to hide amongst the civilians. Now, they have begun to assume human, Awoken, and even Exo appearances, using some unknown technology, and have infiltrated the population. As a result, the civilians have banded together, and have begun to democratically select people to be killed every day, in the hope of rooting out the Fallen infiltrators.


Rules
  • Read the rules. Including this one.
  • Follow all the rules. Including this one.
  • Do not post at night.
  • You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification. Questions asked in-thread will only be answered in-PM, if at all, unless I specifically believe it is something worth telling the general public.
  • Do not share any information (screenshots, copy-paste, etc.) from your role PM in the thread under any circumstances.
  • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the moderators, unless you are specifically allowed to do so.
  • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
  • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
  • Do not pretend to edit or otherwise pretend to break a rule.
  • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
  • Do not edit the tags on the thread. This also applies if you are not playing the game.


Voting/Hanging
  • This game is based on deadline hang. The player with the most votes at the time the deadline is reached is hanged. Ties will be explained in the next section. Starting Day 2, majority hanging is enabled, which means day will end early if at any time a player has more than half the amount of total votes on them. If majority hang is not reached, deadline hang occurs.
  • If there is a tie vote at the end of the day between two players, the result of it will be randomized. However, if there are an equal number of votes for No Hang and a player, No Hang will be the result.
  • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". For example, "Vote: fdas" is an acceptable vote, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", "vote: fdas", "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: Fdas" and "Vote: fdas" are not.
  • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
  • Improperly made votes (including votes in hide tags or any of the unacceptable forms above) will not be counted under any circumstances. I will not tell you if your vote is invalid. There is one exception to this - see below.
  • The characters "I" (capital i) and "l" (lowercase L) are considered the same character for the purpose of voting. That is, attempting to fakevote by substituting one of these characters in will not work. Most other fakevotes are acceptable, but please PM me to confirm that it is. If we do not notice that you fakevoted, it may be counted as a real vote, so it is a good idea to PM me every time you intend to fakevote.
  • You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang". (Note: This is not the same thing as unvoting.)
  • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day more than half of the players currently alive are voting for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
  • Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting to not hang, then nobody will be hanged. It will then be twilight.
  • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
  • During twilight (the time between the end of deadline and the moderator's "do not post" post), players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
  • Once I post an end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.


Activity
  • Each day will be 264 hours (11 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
  • The deadline will occur the very second 264 hours has occurred.
  • Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
  • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
  • Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
  • Activity rule for this game: While not on V/LA, you are expected to make at least one game-advancing post between every activity check, which will be done roughly every 48 hours. If you miss one activity check, you will get an in-game prod; if you miss two activity checks in a row, you will get a PM prod; if you miss three activity checks in a row, you will be replaced. Do not try to abuse this by saying "activity post" every two days - I will warn or replace you if I feel you are posting purely to bypass this requirement.
  • If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.


Etiquette
  • Do not use inappropriate language.
  • Do not make any personal attacks.
  • Be mature.
  • For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, and SE’s/IC's up to one. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force-replaced, depending on the scenario. Please do not make me modkill you.


Moderators
  • I (benjaminsz) am the Moderator of Game 181. zdtsd is my co-moderator.
  • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
  • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
  • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
  • Please do not do things that have the effect of impersonating a moderator. For the most part, though, posting in colors is fine.
  • The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.


Setup
This game will use the Backup6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.
  • There are 9 players.
  • This setup is Day Start.
  • Town Cop is guaranteed to be sane.
  • Town Doctor CANNOT target themselves.
  • Mafia Roleblocker CAN kill and block in the same night.
  • Mafia Roleblocker’s roleblock has priority over Town Jailkeeper’s roleblock.
  • Mafia members may only discuss with each other privately at night in the designated quicktopic.
The roles for this game will be randomly selected out of the following possible role combinations before the game starts:

1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Universal Backup, 2 Mafia Goons

The setup that is chosen is not revealed.

Role PMs
Suriya Hawthorne (Town Doctor) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Suriya Hawthorne (Town Doctor). An experienced survivor, you were the leader of the Farm, the only surviving major human settlement, during the Red War, and you learned a thing or two about curing wounds without the aid of a Ghost in the process. Now, among other things, you are the Last City’s resident medical expert. Once a night, you may PM me a person's username (not yourself). That person will then be protected from being killed by the Mafia that night. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Cayde-6 (Town Tracker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Cayde-6 (Town Tracker). As the Hunter Vanguard Colonel, you’re the finest fast moving, swashbuckling, death-dealing Exo out there, and you have centuries of Guardian experience tracking down your targets. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. Using your ability, you will see who that person targeted each night, if any. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Commander Zavala (Town Jailkeeper) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Commander Zavala (Town Jailkeeper), leader of the Vanguard and the Titan Vanguard Colonel. You’ve lived longer that most Awoken or humans, and even most Exos, and those decades of experience being a Guardian have taught you the true meaning of determination. You also have the supreme responsibility of being the Last City’s chief and only arbiter of justice. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. You will roleblock them, preventing them from using their night action if any, but you will also protect them from being killed by the Mafia. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Ikora Rey (Town Cop) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Ikora Rey (Town Cop). You are the Warlock Vanguard Colonel, and also the smartest Guardian in the Last City. Having studied at the feet of the great Osiris himself, predecessor of Commander Zavala and the greatest Warlock ever to live, you have learned much about the use of Light in the examination of future realities and possibilities, and thus are able to find information about future events that most could never discern. Once a night, you may PM me one person's name. You will then know if they are town or antitown (or if you failed to receive results). The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Lord Shaxx (Universal Backup) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Lord Shaxx (Town Universal Backup), the leader and handler of the Crucible, the arena in which Guardians do battle for valor and glory. Although you usually don’t show anyone your true capabilities, and indeed few people know much of anything about you, this business of the Fallen infiltrators has got you worried. If one of the Vanguard Colonels should be killed, it would be a disaster, and you might even have to step in personally to straighten things out. You will inherit the ability of the first Town Power Role who dies. Your power is reflexive and cannot be roleblocked. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Citizen of the Last City (Vanilla Townie) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Citizen of the Last City. (Vanilla Townie). You survived the Red war on the Farm, and that was tough enough with no Guardians to protect you, but at least back then you knew who and what you were fighting. This Fallen terrorism has you worried that you could be the next to die, and you’re determined to root the two Fallen out, even if it means risking the deaths of innocent civilians - just so long as those civilians aren’t you. Your strength comes in your voice and your vote. The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed.
Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon). You are one of the few survivors of the recent Fallen invasion, and determined to finish what you started. You and your partner, [username], [role name], can choose to kill a town player every night. During the night, you may discuss in [this QT]. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it.
Fallen Marauder Captain (Mafia Roleblocker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are a Fallen Marauder Captain (Mafia Roleblocker). You are the only surviving Captain from the recent Fallen invasion, and determined to finish what you started. With your partner, [username], Fallen Marauder (Mafia Goon), you can choose to kill a town member every night. In addition, you may target one player every night. If that player performs a night action, it will be blocked. During the night, you may discuss in [this QT]. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it.

[*]Starting Day 2, if at any point in a day at least half of the players alive are voting to not hang, then nobody will be hanged. It will then be twilight.
[*]The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
[*]During twilight (the time between the end of deadline and the moderator's "do not post" post), players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
[*]Once I post an end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
[/list]
[/hide]

[hide="Activity"]
[list]
[*]Each day will be 264 hours (11 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
[*]The deadline will occur the very second 264 hours has occurred.
[*]Each night will be 3 real-life days long.
[*]When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
[*]Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night and start of the next day.
[*][b]Activity rule for this game:[/b] While not on V/LA, you are expected to make at least one game-advancing post between every activity check, which will be done roughly every 48 hours. If you miss one activity check, you will get an in-game prod; if you miss two activity checks in a row, you will get a PM prod; if you miss three activity checks in a row, you will be replaced. Do not try to abuse this by saying "activity post" every two days - I will warn or replace you if I feel you are posting purely to bypass this requirement.
[*]If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in [b]bold[/b] in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long. If your V/LA will be longer than about a week, please either try to find a way to participate in the game during that time or ask for a replacement.
[/list]
[/hide]

[hide="Etiquette"]
[list]
[*]Do not use inappropriate language.
[*]Do not make any personal attacks.
[*]Be mature.
[*]For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to two warnings, and SE’s/IC's up to one. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force-replaced, depending on the scenario. Please do not make me modkill you.[/list]
[/hide]

[hide="Moderators"]
[list]
[*]I (benjaminsz) am the Moderator of Game 181. zdtsd is my co-moderator.
[*][color=#f00]Red-colored text (#FF0000)[/color] is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
[*][color=#00f]Blue-colored text (#0000FF)[/color] is used for the moderator and co-mod's posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
[*][color=#0f0]Green-colored text (#00FF00)[/color] is used for town flavor-related posts.
[*]Please do not do things that have the effect of impersonating a moderator. For the most part, though, posting in colors is fine.
[*]The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.
[/hide]

[hide=Setup]
This game will use the [url=https://wiki.mafiascum.net/index.php?title=Backup6]Backup6[/url] setup. This is a semi-open setup.
[list]
[*] There are 9 players.
[*] This setup is Day Start.
[*] Town Cop is guaranteed to be sane.
[*] Town Doctor CANNOT target themselves.
[*] Mafia Roleblocker CAN kill and block in the same night.
[*] Mafia Roleblocker’s roleblock has priority over Town Jailkeeper’s roleblock.
[*] Mafia members may only discuss with each other privately at night in the designated quicktopic.
[/list]
The roles for this game will be randomly selected out of the following possible role combinations before the game starts:

1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Universal Backup, 2 Mafia Goons

The setup that is chosen is not revealed.
